raw_comment:
I notice that almost every sport on here is a majority people of color except baseball. 

I wonder why is there a disproportionate amount of people of color in sports. The population of America is majority white but almost every sport is a majority black. 

This really doesn’t have that much of an impact on my community besides the fact that I ( a white person) probably have less a chance at becoming a professional athlete. 

Headline: Graph shows race disparity between Pro athletes and coaches
